Interface PharmacyManager

All Known Implementing Classes:
JDBCPharmacyManager
public interface PharmacyManager
Interface defining operations for managing pharmacies.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Pharmacy
    findById(String id)
    Finds a pharmacy by its ID.
    Pharmacy
    findbyRegistrationNumber(String number)
    Finds a pharmacy by its registration number.
    List<Pharmacy>
    getAllPharmacies()
    Retrieves all pharmacies in the system.

  • Method Details

    • findbyRegistrationNumber

      Pharmacy findbyRegistrationNumber(String number)
      Finds a pharmacy by its registration number.
      Parameters:
      number - the registration number of the pharmacy
      Returns:
      the pharmacy object if found, null otherwise

    • findById

      Pharmacy findById(String id)
      Finds a pharmacy by its ID.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the pharmacy
      Returns:
      the pharmacy object if found, null otherwise

    • getAllPharmacies

      List<Pharmacy> getAllPharmacies()
      Retrieves all pharmacies in the system.
      Returns:
      a list of all pharmacies
